name: Black'n' White Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cream shortening and sugar replacement until light and fluffy (use a sugar replacement that does not lose sweetness when heated; Aspertame is not suitable).
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in vanilla extract and water.
4. Divide the batter into two equal parts. To one part, add unsweetened coconut and coconut milk, stirring to completely blend.
5. To the remaining half, beat in the melted chocolate.
6. Spread the coconut mixture on the bottom of a well-greased 8-inch square pan.
7. Spread the chocolate layer on top of the coconut layer.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
9. Cut into 1 x 2 inch bars.
Note: Each bar is equivalent to 1/3 bread exchange and 1 fat exchange, with a total of 54 calories.
